target: An etal bife ge: Kejas a wel vin lu ghe?

target: But after me comes one who will baptize you with the Holy Spirit and fire.

source: translate English to Oku: "Truly I tell you, if anyone says to this mountain, ’Go, throw yourself into the sea,’ and does not doubt in their heart but believes that what they say will happen, it will be done for them.
target: Me suuy ǝbluuy se ghen ge, naa nde we ǝb suuyen se kfən yin ge: Məǝke è ndu fey se jio eyghuy, ne ǝb bééme se wen sytem, maanen wiy maanen ge lòó ke gan, é Feyine negy é ke gan.

source: translate English to Oku: While they were eating, Jesus took bread, and when he had given thanks, he broke it and gave it to his disciples, saying, "Take it; this is my body."
target: Ghene loo yie dì, Jesus lie ntuke keban, è bèèlè Feyin, è bekte, è fo se ghon-eyfel na wene, è suuy ge: Ghen ko, kine lu ǝbghun ə wom.

source: translate Oku to English: Əb nàà kuy ɛ fekte kenəə ə Feyin se ghele Islaele, è ghel se eyidie se kubsen tetem ə ghen, è kase fiife se Bààba Feyin na ghen.
target: He will bring back many of the people of Israel to the Lord their God.

source: translate English to Oku: 'Unless you people see signs and wonders,' Jesus told him, 'you will never believe.'
target: Jesus me suuy se wen ge: Buu ge ghen yɛn əbchǝyte ǝbchio ǝbyúméné ghene əbnəə əbkanene ka me nɛɛyen, é ghen jia fo eytem se me.

target: When it arrives, it finds the house swept clean and put in order.

source: translate Oku to English: Di ne nan ketuu eymok na wel se ghene jia yî ley se nkan.

source: translate Oku to English: Jesus suuy se ghene ge: Mɛ keele ge ghen nèy ye suuy njǎŋ əmoke se mɛ ge: "Wele nchak boyse wè eysen. Neey əbnəə wɛ ghes yionen ge wè kì ɛ Kafelnaum, fo fen sêy ɛ ntek ə vie."
target:
Jesus said to them, "Surely you will quote this proverb to me: 'Physician, heal yourself!' And you will tell me, 'Do do here in your hometown what we have heard that you did in Capernaum.'""
1952,Jesus me suuy sêy ge: Mɛ suuy se ghen ge wele ntum na Feyine wiy kelaanen ɛ ntek ə wen."

source: translate English to Oku: Jesus said, 'Neither will I tell you by what authority I am doing these things.'
target: Jesus me suuy ge: Fene me jia fekte sey ghaa me fiin əbtaawe se ye nɛɛye əbnəə vin so.

source: translate Oku to English: Ke lu e titiy ge ghes ye lake shile se abfon a wê Lûm moo ɛngan-a?
target: 'Is it right for us to pay taxes to Caesar or not?'

target: And Judas went to the chief priests and the officers of the temple guard and discussed with them how he might betray Jesus.

source: translate English to Oku: 'Do you now believe?' Jesus replied.
target: Jesus bif se ghene ge: Ghen beememen & leenen-a?

source: translate Oku to English: Me suuy abluuy se ghen ge kekose lòó ke jia chia ba-cyfel nə wen, ne lòó wele ntum jia chia wel we ǝb tumen wen.
target: Very truly I tell you, no servant is greater than his master, nor is a messenger greater than the one who sent him.
